problems_encountered.description: No upgrade candidates available for app installation a-v2tmw9 (confirmed by app/list-upgrade-candidates tool). Cannot test upgrade without available target version.
Tool would modify production app installation by upgrading to a different version. Executing would alter actual app in production environment.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - no upgrade candidates available and would modify production data
execution_notes: This tool upgrades app installations to newer versions. Requires projectId, installationId, and optional targetVersion. The app/list-upgrade-candidates tool confirmed no upgrades are available for the existing app installation. Even if upgrades were available, executing would modify production app configuration which should be avoided during evaluation.
